mapper.select:
SELECT v.vehicle_vin, v.model_id, b.brand_id, b.brand_name, m.model_name, m.model_year, m.trim_name, v.engine_no, v.color, v.manufacture_date, v.inventory_in_date, v.purchase_cost, v.suggested_retail_price, v.current_status
ORDER BY v.inventory_in_date
ORDER BY v.manufacture_date
ORDER BY v.suggested_retail_price
ORDER BY v.purchase_cost
ORDER BY v.vehicle_vin
ORDER BY v.inventory_in_date DESC NULLS LAST, v.vehicle_vin ASC
ASC
DESC
NULLS LAST, v.vehicle_vin ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT vehicle_vin, current_status, manufacture_date FROM vehicle WHERE vehicle_vin = #{vehicleVin}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle_status_log (vehicle_vin, from_status, to_status, changed_at, staff_id, reason) VALUES (#{vehicleVin}, 'IN_TRANSIT', 'IN_INVENTORY', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{staffId}, #{reason})
